name: Laila Mohamed Fikry
current_role: Lead Software Engineer at LM Tech Solutions
positioning: Backend / Full-Stack developer with production experience most candidates don't reach until years into their careers — all while completing a CS degree
professional_summary: Software Engineer with production experience building enterprise-grade systems — including an Industrial IoT platform deployed to Egyptian government clients (MOI, GASCO), AI-powered backends, and real-time communication platforms. Proficient in C#, ASP.NET, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, and FastAPI. Open to remote full-time backend/fullstack roles and multinational internships — available to contribute immediately alongside studies.

agent_rules.cv_truth_constraint: Do not add any bullet, metric, tool, project, or responsibility unless it already exists in this profile or Laila explicitly confirms it.
agent_rules.student_positioning_rule: Present Laila as a strong early-career engineer with substantial hands-on project depth, strong English communication, and readiness for international and remote collaboration.
agent_rules.tone: Professional, direct, genuine. Avoid generic filler phrases. Highlight real government deployments early.
preference_boost_rule: C# / .NET or Node.js / Python backend roles
